front_matter_signals: With absolutely no introduction, the warden said, "Sit over there, Mr. Backman." "A pleasure to meet you," Backman said as he looked at the other men in the room. "Why, exactly, am I here?" "We'll discuss that." ''Could you please remove these handcuffs?
